blockingIssues.description: src/app/page.tsx:73 overstates live availability by changing the hero copy from the source-of-truth closed-beta framing to "Terminal & copy-trading shipping now", which violates the redesign requirement that live-vs-future framing remain honest.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Tighten the frontend-experience-worker procedure and/or handoff rubric so `skillFeedback.followedProcedure=true` requires concrete evidence for redesign-specific screenshot review and test-first ordering (for example, cited screenshot paths plus explicit failing-test evidence).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: All four reviewed landing-redesign features marked `followedProcedure=true`, but reviewers for redesign-design-system-baseline-and-tooling, redesign-tradebetter-led-hero-composition-and-branding, redesign-proof-led-landing-sequence-and-cta-flow, and redesign-authentic-immersive-visual-language all reported missing screenshot-review evidence; two of those reviews also found implementation preceding new failing tests.

rejectedObservations.observation: The repeated screenshot-review evidence gaps from redesign-tradebetter-led-hero-composition-and-branding and redesign-proof-led-landing-sequence-and-cta-flow.
rejectedObservations.reason: duplicate of the consolidated systemic skills recommendation above

rejectedObservations.observation: The repeated test-first adherence gaps from redesign-design-system-baseline-and-tooling and redesign-authentic-immersive-visual-language.
rejectedObservations.reason: duplicate of the consolidated systemic skills recommendation above
